headline: Platform-Based & AI-First
tagline: One foundation. Agentic workflow. AI-native products.

story.title: Platform
story.sentence: We start from a shared base—auth, analytics, CI/CD, observability—so every product ships faster and stays maintainable.

story.title: Agentic
story.sentence: We work with AI-assisted development, automated reviews, and clear processes so we iterate fast without dropping quality.

story.title: AI-native
story.sentence: When we add intelligence—copilots, RAG, recommendations—it’s designed in from day one, not bolted on later.

pillars.label: How we build
pillars.items: Agentic workflows · AI-assisted review · Fast iteration
